name: Build Feature End-to-End
description: Plans, structures, builds (frontend + backend), tests, gets your sign-off, then opens a PR. Studio-coach plans the work, backend-architect lays out files/APIs/data model, frontend-developer wires the UI, backend-architect implements server logic, test-writer-fixer writes & runs tests, you approve the diff, then a final agent opens the PR via the gh CLI.
